programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Micah Parsons returns to Dallas for the first time as a member of the Green Bay Packers as they duel against the Dallas Cowboys in a back-and-forth brawl that goes into overtime and ends in a 40-40 tie game.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Quarterback Joe Burrow leads Cincinnati to victory during Christmas Week with a three-touchdown performance connecting with wide receiver Tee Higgins for all three scores, including an OT touchdown to keep the Bengals in the playoff race.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Greg Zuerlein kicked a 46-yard field goal as time expired as the Cowboys overcame four fumbles and a 20-point deficit in the first quarter to beat the Atlanta Falcons, 40-39, on Sunday.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Atlanta Falcons quarterback Kirk Cousins threw 3 touchdown passes to Kyle Pitts Sr., and Zane Gonzalez kicked a 43-yard field goal as time expired to complete the Atlanta Falcons' rally for a 29-28 victory over the Tampa Bay Buccaneers.

programme.title: NFL Throwback
programme.sub-title: Players to Never Win a Super Bowl
programme.desc: Learn about the top players to never win a Super Bowl during their career.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Saquon Barkley scored on a fake tush push, Jalen Hurts threw one of his two touchdown passes on another variation of the play, and another special-teams score helped the Philadelphia Eagles beat the Tampa Bay Buccaneers 31-25.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Kansas City Chiefs quarterback Patrick Mahomes threw for a season-high 352 yards while rallying the Chiefs from an 11-point deficit; their defense forced the Indianapolis Colts to go three-and-out on its final 4 possessions.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Baltimore Ravens running back Derrick Henry rushed for a season-high 216 yards - the most ever by a visiting player at Lambeau Field - and matched a career high with 4 touchdown runs in the Ravens' 41-24 victory over the Green Bay Packers.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Baltimore Ravens running back Derrick Henry rushed for a season-high 216 yards - the most ever by a visiting player at Lambeau Field - and matched a career high with 4 touchdown runs in the Ravens' 41-24 victory over the Green Bay Packers.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.sub-title: 2025: Bills vs. Jaguars - AFC Wild Card
programme.desc: Buffalo Bills quarterback Josh Allen put together his first career game-winning drive in the fourth quarter or overtime in the playoffs, thanks to some help from his defense and specifically veteran cornerback Tre'Davious White.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.sub-title: 2025: Bills vs. Jaguars - AFC Wild Card
programme.desc: Buffalo Bills quarterback Josh Allen put together his first career game-winning drive in the fourth quarter or overtime in the playoffs, thanks to some help from his defense and specifically veteran cornerback Tre'Davious White.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Justin Herbert capped a 318-yard, three-touchdown performance in a 27-21 victory over Patrick Mahomes and the Kansas City Chiefs on Friday night in São Paulo.

programme.desc: Viewpoints of people in the game with people who love the game; we discuss what is of interest to them in the vast and deep reservoir of stories within the game of golf.

programme.title: Ask Rory
programme.desc: Rory McIlroy explains common amateur mistakes when trying to add distance and his par 5 strategy when going for the green in two.

programme.title: Ask Rory
programme.desc: Rory McIlroy answers member-submitted questions about how to swing better, shoot lower scores and have more fun with challenges on the golf course.

programme.title: Swing Expedition With Chris Como
programme.desc: Instructor Chris Como is on a journey to explore golf's leading teachers and influencers who are shaping the game for future generations. Como travels the world in search of the culture, philosophy, and technology of successful players and coaches.

programme.title: Swing Expedition With Chris Como
programme.desc: Chris Como travels to San Diego to learn how Xander Schauffele has drastically improved on the putting green with his putting coach, Derek Uyeda, and how they have used technology to help.

programme.title: Swing Expedition With Chris Como
programme.desc: Masters champion Scottie Scheffler gives Chris an inside look alongside longtime coach Randy Smith.

programme.title: Playing Lessons
programme.desc: Collin Morikawa joins Jim Mackay on the course to show how he thinks his way around the links. From Las Vegas Paiute Golf Resort in Nevada.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal teach how to play links-style golf like an Open Champion. Learn how to handle the wind like 5-time Open Champion Tom Watson, get up-and-down around the green like 3-time Open Champion Gary Player.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal teach the shots made famous by Open Champions at St. Andrews. Learn how to hit powerful draws like Tiger Woods, escape the rough like Seve Ballesteros, and stick wedges like John Daly.

programme.title: Lessons With a Champion Golfer
programme.desc: 2019 Open Champion Shane Lowry teaches how he controls his driver and iron shots in the wind.

programme.title: Lessons With a Champion Golfer
programme.desc: Rory McIlroy and his lifetime instructor, Michael Bannon, share drills and tips used throughout McIlroy's career.

programme.title: Lessons With a Champion Golfer
programme.desc: Rory McIlroy discusses his pre-putt routine, course management strategies and green reading process with Brandel Chamblee on the course.

programme.title: 9 Shots With Rory
programme.desc: Rory McIlroy covers hitting the nine key shots in golf from different positions on the course needed to shoot lower scores and impress friends.

programme.title: The Skill Code
programme.desc: Cameron McCormick, kicks of The Skill Code with major championship caliber instruction, drills and tips that will be certain to have golfers play better golf.

programme.title: The Skill Code
programme.desc: Setup and swing keys that help you curve the ball on command.

programme.title: The Skill Code
programme.desc: Being able to hit it high and low on command allows players to maintain precise distance control in varied conditions. Whether they're in the wind, under or over trees.

programme.title: The Skill Code
programme.desc: Cameron teaches how to integrate what you have learned in the first three episodes of "The Skill Code" and apply it on the golf course. He also shares course management tips.

programme.title: The Skill Code
programme.desc: Cameron provides instruction to help golfers execute one of golf's most difficult shots - the short wedge shot. He helps you in understanding why contact, speed and dynamic loft will help you play your very best from 40–60 yards.

programme.title: The Skill Code
programme.desc: Cameron McCormick shares his very best instruction to help golfers perfect one of golf's most difficult shots - the short wedge shot.

programme.title: The Skill Code
programme.desc: Cameron McCormick teaches how to play those all-important stroke saving shots from around the green which include: set-up fundamentals, swing dynamics, and tour-proven drills.

programme.title: The Skill Code
programme.desc: Cameron McCormick helps golfers understand how they can have the ability to get up and down with tour-level precision; McCormick dials in the greenside wedge play just with three-time major champion Jordan Spieth.

programme.title: The Skill Code
programme.desc: Preparing for an assortment of difficult shots around the green with teacher Cameron McCormick.

programme.title: The Skill Code
programme.desc: Cameron McCormick brings his instruction into the bunker to help golfers enjoy their trips to the beach.

programme.title: The Skill Code
programme.desc: Cameron McCormick helps golfers make more putts. Most recreational golfers are missing putts because they do not focus on the putting triad - line, speed, and read.

programme.title: The Skill Code
programme.desc: Improving putting by using specific drills and games that allow you to self-detect tendencies in your game and then identify skill improvement opportunities to help you make more putts.

programme.title: 3 Keys to Every Shot
programme.desc: Nick Dougherty analyzes the swings of Rory McIlroy, Collin Morikawa and Jon Rahm to teach the three keys to a variety of challenging golf shots.
